title: Find Your Perfect Resume Template
subtitle: Find Your Perfect Resume Template
description: Every template is carefully crafted to help you land your dream job. Choose from modern, classic, creative, and industry-specific designs that highlight your unique strengths.
editWithNewTemplate: Edit your resume with a new template
selectTemplateStart: Select a template to start building your resume
readyTitle: Ready to Create Your Professional Resume?
readyDescription: Choose a template and start building your resume in minutes. Export to PDF, DOCX, and more.

modern.name: Modern
modern.description: Professional layout with balanced whitespace and clean typography. Stakes the experience timeline while keeping a light sidebar.

classic.name: Classic
classic.description: Traditional resume flow with stacked sections and serif typography.

minimal.name: Minimal
minimal.description: Single-column whitespace-first template for recruiters who love clarity.

creative.name: Creative
creative.description: Bold column-split template with accent imagery and feature cards.

technical.name: Technical
technical.description: Skills-heavy layout with a sidebar that highlights languages and certifications.

softwareDeveloper.name: Software Developer
softwareDeveloper.description: Tech-focused layout emphasizing skills, projects, and tools. Features technology icons and GitHub/portfolio links.

dataScientist.name: Data Scientist
dataScientist.description: Data-driven template with skills charts, GitHub links, and emphasis on projects with quantifiable impact.

uxDesigner.name: UX/UI Designer
uxDesigner.description: Clean, modern layout showcasing design projects and portfolio links. Emphasizes design skills and tools.

graphicDesigner.name: Graphic Designer
graphicDesigner.description: Visual-first template for creative professionals. Showcases design sensibility with bold typography.

productManager.name: Product Manager
productManager.description: Strategy-focused template highlighting product launches, metrics, and roadmap experience.

projectManager.name: Project Manager
projectManager.description: Leadership-focused template with timeline graphics and emphasis on certifications (PMP, CSM).

marketing.name: Marketing Manager
marketing.description: Campaign-focused template emphasizing metrics, digital skills, and creative achievements.

sales.name: Sales Executive
sales.description: Results-driven template highlighting quota attainment, revenue metrics, and CRM skills.

accountant.name: Accountant
accountant.description: Finance-focused template emphasizing certifications (CPA, CFA), numerical achievements, and compliance skills.

nurse.name: Nurse / Healthcare
nurse.description: Healthcare-focused template highlighting licenses, clinical skills, and patient care achievements.

teacher.name: Teacher / Educator
teacher.description: Education-focused template emphasizing certifications, subjects taught, and classroom achievements.

academic.name: Academic / Researcher
academic.description: Multi-page CV template emphasizing publications, grants, research interests, and academic appointments.

lawyer.name: Lawyer / Attorney
lawyer.description: Formal legal template emphasizing bar admission, practice areas, and legal experience.

engineer.name: Engineer
engineer.description: Technical template highlighting projects, CAD/software tools, and engineering certifications (PE).

executive.name: Executive / C-Level
executive.description: Polished leadership template with executive summary, core competencies, and board-level achievements.

hr.name: HR / Recruiter
hr.description: People-focused template highlighting talent acquisition metrics, HR certifications, and recruiting tools.

consultant.name: Management Consultant
consultant.description: Strategy-focused template emphasizing case studies, client impact, and analytical skills.

itSupport.name: IT Support
itSupport.description: Technical template highlighting help desk experience, systems administration, and IT certifications.

military.name: Military Transition
military.description: Veteran-focused template translating military experience to civilian terms with security clearance emphasis.

federal.name: Federal / Government
federal.description: USAJOBS-optimized template with detailed position information, GS grade, and KSA narratives.
